linapro-demo-dynamic.description: Dynamic wasm sample that demonstrates a host-embedded menu page, plugin-owned SQL CRUD, and a hosted standalone page.
linapro-demo-dynamic.name: Dynamic Plugin Demo

page.description: This page is mounted from the linapro-demo-dynamic embedded entry so the host can verify content rendering and the hosted standalone jump flow.
page.emptyText: Only the install-SQL seed record exists right now. You can still create, edit, or delete custom records.

data.description: Install-time SQL creates the plugin-owned business table so the page can handle CRUD and attachment downloads directly.
data.label: Data Sample

integration.description: The host shell imports the page entry dynamically and keeps using the host login session for backend dynamic routes.
integration.label: Integration

lifecycle.description: Disable keeps data intact, while uninstall lets the host decide whether data and files are cleaned together.
lifecycle.label: Lifecycle

message.deleteRecordFailed: Failed to delete the demo record
message.saveRecordFailed: Failed to save the demo record

lifecycle.description: Uninstall can optionally keep or remove data and files together
lifecycle.label: Lifecycle Cleanup

loader.description: Loaded and mounted by the host shell at runtime
loader.label: Dynamic Loader
loader.value: Mounted by the host shell at runtime

schema.description: Install-time SQL creates plugin-owned sample data
schema.label: SQL Bootstrap
schema.value: Install-time SQL bootstraps plugin-owned sample data

storage.description: Demo records can attach files stored in the plugin namespace
storage.label: File Storage
storage.value: Records can attach files in the plugin namespace

modal.attachmentFieldHint: Upload one sample attachment. If uninstall also clears plugin storage, the uploaded file is removed together.
modal.removeAttachment: Remove the current attachment on submit
modal.summary: Record content is stored in the table created by the linapro-demo-dynamic install SQL. Uploaded files are stored in the plugin-authorized storage path.

page.standaloneHint: Open the hosted static page in a new window to verify plugin asset publishing.

standalone.card1Body: linapro-demo-dynamic is a dynamic plugin sample used to demonstrate directory conventions, Wasm artifact delivery, hosted assets, and the host mount protocol.
standalone.card2Body: This page intentionally avoids the default admin shell style and demonstrates how a plugin can deliver its own static visual language while remaining professional and readable.
standalone.footer: If you can see this page now, the host is correctly serving the standalone assets of the dynamic plugin through a stable URL.
standalone.lead: This page is served directly by linapro-demo-dynamic as a hosted static asset rather than through the Vben frontend framework. It verifies that a dynamic plugin can render inside the host workspace and can also open a full standalone experience in a new window.
standalone.summary1Body: The page file is served from the plugin-hosted asset directory instead of a host source route.
standalone.summary2Body: The standalone page does not reuse Vben components or layout, but it still keeps a polished and readable presentation.
standalone.summary3Body: Users can jump here from the host workspace and verify the flow from embedded mount to standalone access.
standalone.title: Dynamic Plugin Standalone Page

page.title: Dynamic Plugin Demo Is Live
page.workspaceSummary: This area reads the table created by the linapro-demo-dynamic install SQL and uses the plugin backend routes for create, update, delete, and attachment downloads. Disabling the plugin does not clear the data.

uninstall_blocked.demo_records_exist: Dynamic demo records exist for one or more tenants. Delete demo records before uninstalling.
